---
layout: cv
title: Ryan Carter's CV
---
# Ryan Carter
Data Science, Statistics

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="isaac@applesdofall.org">isaac@applesdofall.org</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Newton">My wikipedia page</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://yourusername.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Majoring in Data Science, minoring in Statistics

### Specialized in

MS Excel, Power Bi, R Studio, Python, Tableau


### Research interests

Ai implementation and analytics


## Education

`2024-2027`
Brigham Young University - Idaho



## Awards




## Publications

<!-- A list is also available [online](http://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=LTOTl0YAAAAJ) -->

### Journals


### Patents



## Occupation

`May 2025 - Apr 2026`
Traveling Operations Specialist & On-Site Lead





<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
